allow: Bash(venv/bin/python -c "from langchain import chains; print\('chains OK'\)")
Bash(venv/bin/python -c "import pkgutil, langchain_core; print\([m.name for m in pkgutil.walk_packages\(langchain_core.__path__, 'langchain_core.'\)]\)")

Bash(venv/bin/python -c "import pkgutil, langchain_community; mods=[m.name for m in pkgutil.walk_packages\(langchain_community.__path__, 'langchain_community.'\)]; print\([m for m in mods if 'history' in m.lower\(\) or 'retriev' in m.lower\(\) or 'chain' in m.lower\(\)][:15]\)")
Bash(OPENAI_API_KEY=test venv/bin/python -c "from app.rag_chain import build_rag_chain, ask_rag, ask_rag_stream; print\('rag_chain OK'\)")
Bash(OPENAI_API_KEY=test venv/bin/python -c "from app.main import app; print\('main OK'\)")
